signals.raw:
South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026 (latest data), up from 2.0% in Jan-Feb but below 2.4% forecasts | NO | HIGH confidence**[1]

Bank of Korea held policy rate at 2.5% last week (6th meeting) and raised 2026 inflation outlook to 2.2% from 2.1%, citing Middle East conflict and energy shocks; no new rate decision today**[1][3]
